steps.name: Phase 0: Foundry Migration & Compilation
steps.description: Convert Hardhat project to Foundry and ensure successful compilation
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-0.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-0 agent using the Task tool. This phase will migrate the project to Foundry (if needed) and verify compilation artifacts are generated successfully.

steps.name: Compilation Check Decision
steps.description: Check if COMPILATION_FAILED.md exists to determine if workflow should stop

steps.name: Phase 1: Contract Analysis & Scaffolding Preparation
steps.description: Identify contracts for invariant testing and prepare scaffolding requirements
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-1.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-1 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 2: Setup.sol Configuration
steps.description: Modify Setup.sol to deploy and configure all target contracts for fuzzing
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-2.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-2 agent using the Task tool. This phase will modify the Setup.sol contract to properly deploy and configure target contracts, validate compilation and test execution, and generate documentation in magic/setup-notes.md.

steps.name: Phase 3: Run Echidna
steps.description: Run Echidna to test the fuzzing setup

steps.name: Echidna Output Check
steps.description: Check if echidna/ directory exists to verify Echidna ran successfully

decision.NOTE: Echidna ran successfully, jump to extract target functions
Echidna failed to create output directory, jump to fix step

steps.name: Fix Echidna Failure
steps.description: Resolve issues preventing Echidna from running successfully
steps.prompt: Echidna failed to run successfully. The echidna/ directory was not created. Use the styleguide.MD file at ./.opencode/styleguide.MD to understand the expected setup and resolve the issue. Review the Setup.sol contract, echidna.yaml configuration, and CryticTester contract to identify and fix any problems preventing Echidna from executing properly.

steps.name: Phase 4: Extract Target Functions
steps.description: Extract all targeted functions from the fuzzing suite using the extract_target_functions.py script

steps.name: Phase 5: Order Prerequisite Functions
steps.description: Sort functions in testing-priority.json based on prerequisite count

steps.name: Phase 5 Agent: Setup Phase 5
steps.description: Execute setup-phase-5 agent for additional setup tasks
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-5.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-5 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Phase 6 Agent: Setup Phase 6
steps.description: Execute setup-phase-6 agent for final setup tasks
steps.prompt: You are provided an agent definition at ./.opencode/agent/setup-phase-6.md. Run exclusively the setup-phase-6 agent using the Task tool.

steps.name: Workflow Completion Summary
steps.description: Generate final summary of fuzzing setup completion
steps.prompt:
Create a file called FUZZING_SETUP_COMPLETE.md that summarizes:
1. Successfully completed all phases (Phase 0 through Phase 6)
2. List the key artifacts created (foundry.toml, Setup.sol, magic/setup-notes.md, testing-priority.json)
3. Confirm that forge build compiles successfully
4. Confirm that forge test runs without reverts
5. Provide next steps: user can now run fuzzing campaigns using Echidna or other fuzzing tools
